title: Building
description: A building template defining construction costs, upkeep, and production.

footprint_cells.description: Settlement grid cells occupied. 1 = standard. Multi-cell via template only.

construction_cost.description: Required goods and labor. Keys are good IDs or 'labor_days'.

upkeep_per_season.description: Recurring seasonal cost. Keys are good IDs or 'coin'.

max_workers.description: Maximum number of worker slots available.

housing_capacity.description: Number of residents this building can house.

production.description: Production configuration. Only present for production-category buildings.

tier_min.description: Minimum settlement tier required to place this building.

local_tile_category.description: Hint for the LocalView tile renderer — which tileset category to use for the 25×25 sub-grid fill.

labor_slots.description: Work slot templates produced by BuildingPlacer when this building is stamped.

z_levels.description: Z-levels present in this building. 0=ground, 1=upper, -1=cellar. Omit for single-floor buildings.

local_layout.description: 25×25 ASCII floor plan. Each string is one row of 25 chars. Key: # wall  . floor  + door  ~ water  , dirt  _ open ground  b bed  t table  c counter  s shelf/crate  f forge/fire  ^ stairs-up  v stairs-down  % crop  * rubble  x chest  A anvil  M millstone  p pillar
